scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
scripts.codegen: graphql-codegen --config codegen.ts && prettier --write shared/src/generated/graphql.ts server/src/generated/resolvers.ts client/src/app/api/generated.ts
